title: Lacquered Moroccan Chicken Tangia
description: A savory, crispy chicken tangia glazed with a sweet-salty lacquer, served atop toasted wholegrain bread for a protein-packed Moroccan snack.
instructions: Season the chicken cubes with cumin, coriander, paprika, cinnamon, salt, and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat and add the chicken, cooking until browned on all sides.
Whisk together honey, lemon juice, and a tablespoon of olive oil to create the lacquer glaze.
Pour the glaze over the chicken, reduce heat, and simmer for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Toast the wholegrain bread slices until crisp.
Spread melted butter on each toasted slice and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds.
Arrange the glazed chicken on top of the buttered bread slices.
Garnish with chopped cilantro for freshness.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve warm, optionally drizzling any remaining glaze over the top.
